CHAR 1 x
A2122E_ROUTE_PRVDR_OTHR_CD Provider Trans - Other Methods Indicate whether the route(s) of transmission of the current reconciled medication list to the subsequent provider was an alternate method. 0. No
1. Yes
^ . Blank CHAR 1 x
A2123_CRNT_MDCTN_LST_RSDNT_CD Current Reconciled Medication List - Ptnt (Dis) Indicates whether, at the time of discharge, the current facility provided the patient’s current reconciled medication list to the patient, family and/or caregiver. 0. No– Current
